en: Why do we need the dog? It's not the dog we need.
ko: 개가 왜 필요해? 우리한테 필요한 건 개가 아니야.

en: Right, what did he say? He said, edge is edge. He only chopped it down because he couldn't see the view no more, was he mumbo?
ko: 그래서 뭐래? 울타리는 울타리래. 전망이 안 보여서 잘랐을 뿐이래, 뭐 이상한 소리 아니지?

en: What did he say? He said, edge is edge. He only chopped it down because he couldn't see the view no more, was he mumbo?
ko: 뭐래? 울타리는 울타리래. 전망이 안 보여서 잘랐을 뿐이래, 뭐 이상한 소리 아니지?

en: Right. Look, I appreciate your position, Mr. Webley, but you can't go around chopping down other people's hedges without permission.
ko: 네. 웨블리 씨, 입장은 이해하지만 허락 없이 남의 울타리를 잘라버리면 안 됩니다.

en: I don't. I suppose. Yes, I suppose. Thank you.
ko: 안 하지. 그런 것 같아. 응, 그런 것 같아. 고마워.

en: Mr. Webley, I trust you have a license for that firearm? I does for this one.
ko: 웨블리 씨, 그 총기 허가증이 있겠죠? 이거는 있어.

en: Does for this one? He does for this one.
What do you mean by this one?
Where on earth did you get these?
Found them. He found them? And what is this?
Well, Mr. Webley, this is an extremely dangerous collection. It's a wonder nobody's been hurt before.
ko: 웨블리 씨, 이건 극도로 위험한 컬렉션이에요. 지금까지 아무도 다치지 않은 게 신기하네요.

en: Nah, it is a lot of junk.
You what? No, apparently it's been deactivated. Over.
That's right. Deactivate. It's not live. It looks live. All right.
ko: 맞아. 비활성화. 실탄 아니야. 실탄처럼 보이는데. 알겠어.
